title: Robin and Rebecca Move Forward
description: Pages 11–15 focus on robin and rebecca move forward, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the allies learn about Mansherry's healing power and start searching the palace while the battles continue under the Birdcage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What a jaw! Skull's been crushed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell is your deal! I just put a friggin' hole in his stomach!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You bastard! How dare you do that to farul!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Shit... If only we had the keys to these cuffs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I could make short work of these guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Oghh... shit, that's what happens when I let my guard down ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Nico-ya! Where's my key!? Hand it over, quick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: that little girl, all by herself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: She may manage to make it to the Royal Palace, but she won't be able to do anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'll hunt her down and put an end to her!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: The name's Gladius! And I'm going to start by dis- posing of you trash!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Luffy! Traffy- Kan! and soldier- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Quickly, go! The sunflower fields are on level 4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Rebecca's waiting there with the key!

summary: Robin and Rebecca Move Forward develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
